---
title: "Foot Pressure Analysis for Pedography and Gait Assessment"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Foot Pressure Analysis for Pedography and Gait Assessment}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

<!-- badges: start -->
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/CTTIR/pressR/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/CTTIR/pressR/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![pkgdown](https://github.com/CTTIR/pressR/actions/workflows/pkgdown.yaml/badge.svg)](https://cttir.github.io/pressR/)
[![CRAN status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/pressR)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=pressR)
[![Codecov test coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/CTTIR/pressR/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/CTTIR/pressR?branch=main)
[![CRAN downloads](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/pressR)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=pressR)
[![CRAN downloads total](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/pressR)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=pressR)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
[![Lifecycle: experimental](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-experimental-orange.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#experimental)
<!-- badges: end -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4.5, dpi = 96
)
```

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(pressR)
```

Plantar-pressure measurement is used in pedography, gait analysis, and
diabetic-foot risk assessment. This vignette demonstrates the workflow
using a synthetic in-shoe insole trial.

```{r}
trial <- pr_example_trial("insole")
trial
```

## Gait cycle detection

```{r}
cycles <- pr_calc_gait_cycles(trial)
cycles
```

## Force vs time with cycles

```{r, fig.alt="Force vs time with stance phases shaded"}
pr_plot_force_time(trial, show_cycles = TRUE)
```

## Center of pressure and rollover

```{r, fig.alt="COP trajectory over time"}
pr_plot_cop(trial)
```

```{r, fig.alt="COP butterfly across cycles"}
pr_plot_cop_butterfly(trial)
```

## Regional analysis

```{r}
pr_calc_regional(trial)
```

## Diabetic foot thresholds

```{r}
pr_ref_diabetic_foot()
```

## Composite foot report

```{r, fig.alt="Foot-pressure composite report", fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
pr_plot_foot_report(trial)
```
